description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set on a large, flat green plot, featuring a compact rectangular footprint with a modern, clean-lined design. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large window openings distributed across the facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The roof is flat, contributing to the contemporary architectural style, and there is no visible porch or veranda. The building includes multiple entry points, with a main entrance clearly visible on one side, and several secondary doors and windows on the other sides. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, enhancing the modern aesthetic. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with glass for the windows and metal likely used for framing and fixtures.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large asymmetrical windows, and a clean, rectangular design set on a green plot.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance and a prominent set of windows on a white facade, with the flat roof clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals additional windows and a secondary entrance, highlighting the building's rectangular shape and flat roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displays more windows and a possible back door, with the green plot extending around the structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows a simpler facade with fewer windows and no visible entrances, emphasizing the building's clean lines.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
